case_title: DANIEL ARANAS VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE & CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARANAS, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE & CO. DBA CHASE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.79 FILED BY ARANAS, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE & CO. DBA CHASE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED SEP-12-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE & CO. DBA CHASE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
